title: render
description: Entry point for CReact applications. Renders the component tree, reconciles state, runs handlers.
signature: render(fn: () => any, memory: Memory, stackName: string, options?: RenderOptions): RenderResult
param_fn_desc: Function that returns the root component tree.
param_stack_name_desc: Required. Identifier for the state store.
returns_desc: A <0>RenderResult</0> object (synchronous). The <1>ready</1> property is a <2>Promise<void></2> that resolves when the initial deployment completes.
